requirement.description: If any critical input signal is not updated within its configured timeout, the gateway shall set a timeout fault flag.
requirement.python_test_setup:
# ============================================================
# Gateway ECU – Signal Timeout Detection Tests (C-01)
# ============================================================
import time
import can
import pytest

GW_FAULT_STATUS_ID = 0x118
GW_FAULT_STATUS_DLC = 8

# ---------------------------
# CAN Bus Fixture
# ---------------------------
@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.Bus(
        interface="vector",      # vector / socketcan / pcan configurable
        channel=0,
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

# ---------------------------
# Utility Functions
# ---------------------------
def collect_messages(bus, msg_id, duration_sec):
    messages = []
    start_time = time.time()
    while time.time() - start_time < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.5)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == msg_id:
            messages.append(msg)
    return messages


def decode_door_signal_timeout(msg):
    return (msg.data[0] >> 0) & 0x01


def decode_speed_signal_timeout(msg):
    return (msg.data[0] >> 1) & 0x01

test_cases.title: Verify GW_FaultStatus message transmission presence
test_cases.precondition: Vehicle ignition ON; Gateway ECU powered; CAN monitoring tool connected and configured to capture message ID 0x118
steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_FaultStatus message
test_cases.expected_result: GW_FaultStatus message is present on the CAN bus
test_cases.postcondition: Switch ignition OFF; disconnect CAN monitoring tool

test_cases.title: Verify no timeout flags when signals updated correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; all critical input signals updated periodically
steps: Ensure door and vehicle speed signals are transmitted normally

test_cases.title: Verify door signal timeout flag set
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; door status input active initially
steps: Stop transmission of door status input via CAPL
Wait longer than configured door signal timeout
test_cases.postcondition: Restore door status transmission; stop CAN monitoring

test_cases.title: Verify speed signal timeout flag set
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; vehicle speed input active initially
steps: Stop transmission of vehicle speed input via CAPL
Wait longer than configured speed signal timeout
test_cases.postcondition: Restore vehicle speed transmission; stop CAN monitoring

test_cases.title: Verify multiple timeout flags set simultaneously
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; all critical inputs active
steps: Stop door and vehicle speed input transmissions
test_cases.postcondition: Restore all input signals; stop CAN monitoring

test_cases.title: Verify timeout flag clears after signal resumes
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; timeout flag previously set
test_cases.expected_result: Timeout flag returns to 0 after valid signal updates

test_cases.title: Verify GW_FaultStatus message DLC
Verify GW_FaultStatus stops transmitting on power OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_timeout_008_stop_on_power_off(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_FAULT_STATUS_ID, 2)
    assert msgs_before
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_FAULT_STATUS_ID, 2)
    assert not msgs_after
